selected_candidate: Expose readback-only checkpoint inspect and prove it replays the bundle written after Atlas final-synthesis readback import.
rejected_candidates: Only test the private Store.LoadCheckpointBundle helper; rejected because docs and Feature Depth commands require an operator-facing CLI.
Add a mutation-style resume command; rejected because node 22 is readback/replay only and must not execute work.
Add a new provider-backed replay path; rejected because provider calls are outside the safety boundary.
decision_basis: The existing code writes checkpoint bundles on import, but the documented checkpoint inspect command was missing from the CLI.
